docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,205.27 FILED BY THE FRENCH SPOT LLC AS TO DEFENDANT SEXTANT COFFEE ROASTERS, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION AHMED, KINANI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-14-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $90.00 SERVED JAN-17-2025, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT SEXTANT COFFEE ROASTERS, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-14-2025 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-22-2025 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF THE FRENCH SPOT LLC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED VINCENT ATTALI, CHEF AND CO-OWNER. DEFENDANT SEXTANT COFFEE ROASTERS, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT KINNI AHMED IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFECTIVE PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE FOR AGENT OF SERVICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE FOR DEFENDANT KINANI ATTALI. JUDGE: CARRIE ZEPEDA; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) VINCENT ATTALI, CHEF & CO-OWNER FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE FRENCH SPOT LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-22-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-22-2025 BY JUDGE PRO TEM TOM COHEN. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF THE FRENCH SPOT LLC IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS SEXTANT COFFEE ROASTERS, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION AND KINANI AHMED ARE NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-22-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE FRENCH SPOT LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SEXTANT COFFEE ROASTERS, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION AHMED, KINANI $6,205.27 PRINCIPAL, $165.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,370.27 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
